inputs.label: Total Energy Generated
inputs.businessContext: Total energy produced by the system over the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy produced by the system over the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistem tarafından ölçüm periyodu boyunca üretilen toplam enerji.

inputs.label: Total Energy Consumed
inputs.businessContext: Total energy utilized by core processes, excluding auxiliary systems.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy utilized by core processes, excluding auxiliary systems.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yardımcı sistemler hariç, temel prosesler tarafından kullanılan toplam enerji.

inputs.label: Transmission Loss
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of surplus energy lost during transmission and conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of surplus energy lost during transmission and conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletim ve dönüşüm sırasında kaybedilen fazla enerjinin yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Storage Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of energy storage systems in recovering surplus energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of energy storage systems in recovering surplus energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji depolama sistemlerinin fazla enerjiyi geri kazanma verimliliği.

inputs.label: Auxiliary Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Energy consumed by auxiliary systems (e.g., cooling, controls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy consumed by auxiliary systems (e.g., cooling, controls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yardımcı sistemler (ör. soğutma, kontroller) tarafından tüketilen enerji.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
